claims.quote: The Institute’s physicians serve as principal investigators for numerous studies now in progress. Our physicians are regularly published and present at conferences.
claims.claimText: Institute physicians serve as principal investigators on active studies and present at conferences — research infrastructure signal.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured fellowships and FIU affiliation but did not record the explicit research-activity paragraph that opens the page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Research infrastructure that supports trainee/fellow research engagement; Tier 2.
claims.limitations: No mention of student/observer/visitor research access or application route.
